features: 【Hand Controlled Mini Drones for Kids 】The UFO flying drone are equipped with 360° motion sensors that detect objects for ultimate flight control and obstacle avoidance. Place both hands on both sides of the drone, swipe a hand under when the lights start to blink rapidly, and watch this LED drone perform a 360° flip, get super cool and enjoy super fun. It’s designed to work indoors as well as outdoors, with a smooth flight pattern effect.

【Indoor Hover Drone for Beginners】This UFO drone toy is super easy to fly, making it a great beginner drone for kids ages 6 and up. Flying with powerful motors and smart, obstacle avoidance motion sensors, simply use your hand (with gesture control) to guide its flight at floats, moves, and 360 stunting. Then catch the UFO drone over and it will stop flying automatically.

【Durable and Safe】This flying toy drone is made of non toxic and high-grade PP material, safe webbed shell that protects hands, walls, and furniture from the propellers. Woven shell design and protective case makes it easy to catch and keeps it from breaking, which is lightweight and flexible, making it able to withstand countless crashes.

【USB Charging and Portable 】About 35 minutes full charge, 7-10 working duration. The hover flying ball enables various charging options such as charged by computer, power adapter, mobile phone, portable charger etc. The indicator light comes on when charging and goes off when fully charged. Wherever you go, the drone ball for kids can easily carry, and will not take up a lot of space.

【Dazzling and Eye-catching】The magic hover ball built-in RGB Light, colors are vibrant look like a neon shooting star when you launch it across the sky. This cool stuff not only brings fun to play but also improve children's hands-on ability, operating skills and creativity. This cool mini drone toy is a fun novelty gift for birthdays, Halloween, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas. Great gifts for 6 7 8 9 10 11 12 year old boys and girls teens kids adult.
